languages.original_text: "I did wonder what caused those bright flashes in the fog around you every time you left the bridge. They truly are less frequent now."

languages.text: "А я гадала, от чего эти яркие вспышки в тумане, что укутывают вас каждый раз, когда вы покидаете мостик. Их действительно стало меньше".
"I did wonder what caused those bright flashes in the fog around you every time you left the bridge. They truly are less frequent now."
languages.original_text: "А я гадала, от чего эти яркие вспышки в тумане, что укутывают вас каждый раз, когда вы покидаете мостик. Их действительно стало меньше".

traits.locale_text: "I did wonder what caused those bright flashes in the fog around you every time you left the bridge. They truly are less frequent now."

"I did wonder what caused those bright flashes in the fog around you every time you left the bridge. They truly are less frequent now."

languages.text: 「あなたが橋を降りるたびに、あなたの周りの霧の中で、明るい閃光が原因は何だったのか、不思議に思っていました。確かに、今は以前より閃光が減りましたね」
languages.original_text: "I did wonder what caused those bright flashes in the fog around you every time you left the bridge. They truly are less frequent now."

traits.locale_text: 「あなたが橋を降りるたびに、あなたの周りの霧の中で、明るい閃光が原因は何だったのか、不思議に思っていました。確かに、今は以前より閃光が減りましたね。」

languages.text: « Je me demandais ce qui provoquait ces éclats de lumière vive dans la brume qui vous entoure chaque fois que vous quittiez la passerelle. Il est vrai que je les vois moins fréquemment, maintenant. »
languages.original_text: "I did wonder what caused those bright flashes in the fog around you every time you left the bridge. They truly are less frequent now."

traits.locale_text: « Je me demandais ce qui provoquait ces éclats de lumière vive dans la brume qui vous entoure chaque fois que vous quittiez la passerelle. Il est vrai que je les vois moins fréquemment, maintenant. »

languages.text: "Ich habe mich gefragt, woher diese hellen Blitze im Nebel kamen, die Euch beim Verlassen der Brücke immer umgaben. Mittlerweile treten sie deutlich seltener auf."
languages.original_text: "I did wonder what caused those bright flashes in the fog around you every time you left the bridge. They truly are less frequent now."

traits.locale_text: "Ich habe mich gefragt, woher diese hellen Blitze im Nebel kamen, die Euch beim Verlassen der Brücke immer umgaben. Mittlerweile treten sie deutlich seltener auf."

languages.text: "Köprüden her ayrıldığında etrafındaki sisin içinde o parlak parıltılara neyin sebep olduğunu merak ediyordum. Artık gerçekten daha az görünür oluyorlar."
languages.original_text: "I did wonder what caused those bright flashes in the fog around you every time you left the bridge. They truly are less frequent now."

traits.locale_text: "Köprüden her ayrıldığında etrafındaki sisin içinde o parlak parıltılara neyin sebep olduğunu merak ediyordum. Artık gerçekten daha az görünür oluyorlar."

languages.text: «Me preguntaba qué causaba esos fogonazos en la niebla que le envuelve cada vez que se marchaba del puente. Ahora son menos frecuentes».
languages.original_text: "I did wonder what caused those bright flashes in the fog around you every time you left the bridge. They truly are less frequent now."

traits.locale_text: «Me preguntaba qué causaba esos fogonazos en la niebla que le envuelve cada vez que se marchaba del puente. Ahora son menos frecuentes».

languages.text: “我之前还纳闷，怎么每次你离开舰桥，身边的雾气里总闪着明晃晃的光。现在这情形确实少了。”
languages.original_text: "I did wonder what caused those bright flashes in the fog around you every time you left the bridge. They truly are less frequent now."

traits.locale_text: “我之前还纳闷，怎么每次你离开舰桥，身边的雾气里总闪着明晃晃的光。现在这情形确实少了。”
